description: WebSocket Integration - Real-time push-based updates for trading activity, evolution events, market data, and system status with auto-reconnect and subscription management

userStories.title: Create WebSocket client with connection state management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a WebSocket client to manage real-time connections.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement connection state: connecting, connected, disconnected, error
Implement connect() method to establish WebSocket connection
Implement disconnect() method to close connection cleanly
Implement reconnect() method for manual reconnection
Implement getState() method to return current connection state

userStories.title: Implement auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
userStories.description: As a user, I need the system to automatically reconnect after connection loss.
acceptanceCriteria: Add auto-reconnect logic when connection closes unexpectedly
Add maximum reconnect attempt limit (optional, can be infinite)
Clear reconnect timer on successful connection
Clear reconnect timer on manual disconnect
Log all reconnect attempts with timestamp

userStories.title: Add ping/pong health checks for connection
userStories.description: As a system, I need to verify WebSocket connection health with ping/pong messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Send ping message every 30 seconds when connected
Close connection and reconnect if no pong received (60s timeout)
Reset pong timer on each pong received
Log ping/pong activity in development mode

userStories.title: Add WebSocket authentication with token
userStories.description: As a system, I need to authenticate WebSocket connections.
acceptanceCriteria: Add auth token to WebSocket connection URL as query parameter
Read auth token from localStorage (auth_token key)
Handle authentication failure response from server
Disconnect and show error if auth fails
Support token refresh for long-lived connections
Clear auth token on logout and disconnect
userStories.notes: Security audit identified architectural concerns with localStorage usage and query parameter transmission for tokens. Future improvements should consider HttpOnly cookies and alternative token transmission methods.

userStories.title: Create WebSocket event type definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript interfaces for all WebSocket event types.
acceptanceCriteria: Define WSEventType enum: SYSTEM_STATUS, TRADE_UPDATE, NEW_SIGNAL, EVOLUTION_EVENT, GENERATION_CHANGED, CONTROLLER_DECISION, FEATURE_MUTATED, MARKET_UPDATE, PERFORMANCE_UPDATE, MT5_CONNECTED, MT5_DISCONNECTED, MT5_ORDER_OPENED, MT5_ORDER_CLOSED, MT5_POSITION_MODIFIED, MT5_ERROR
Define WSEvent<T> interface with event, data, timestamp, correlationId
Define MT5Event interfaces for all MT5 events

userStories.title: Create event handler registration system
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an event system to handle WebSocket messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add on(event, handler) method to register event handlers
Add off(event, handler) method to unregister event handlers
Add emit(event, data) method to send messages to server
Dispatch incoming messages to appropriate handlers
Log all events in development mode

userStories.title: Add Zod validation for WebSocket events
userStories.description: As a developer, I need runtime validation for WebSocket messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Zod schemas for each event type in src/lib/websocket/schemas.ts
Log validation errors with full message details
Add safe default parsing for unknown fields

userStories.title: Create connection status indicator component
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see the real-time connection status at all times.
acceptanceCriteria: Show green dot for connected state
Show yellow dot for connecting state (animated)
Show red dot for disconnected/error state
Show latency in milliseconds when available
Add manual reconnect button when disconnected
Verify in browser that indicator displays correctly

userStories.title: Create useConnectionState hook for connection status
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to access WebSocket connection state.
acceptanceCriteria: Return connection state from WebSocket client
Return reconnect() function for manual reconnection

userStories.title: Create subscription manager for data streams
userStories.description: As a system, I need to manage which data streams to subscribe to.
acceptanceCriteria: Define SubscriptionType enum: TRADES, EVOLUTION, MARKETS, SYSTEM_STATUS, PERFORMANCE, MT5
Send subscribe message to server when subscribing
Send unsubscribe message to server when unsubscribing

userStories.title: Create useRealTimeTrades hook for trade updates
userStories.description: As a user, I need real-time updates to my active trades.
acceptanceCriteria: Update trades array when trade_update events received
Add flash animation for updated values
Move trades to recent when status changes to closed
Show toast notification for large P&L changes (>10%)
Verify in browser that trades update in real-time

userStories.title: Create useRealTimeEvolution hook for evolution events
userStories.description: As a user, I need real-time evolution event notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Append new events to evolution log
Show toast for important events (new generation, aggressive evolution)
Auto-scroll log to show newest events
Add event count badge for new events
Verify in browser that evolution events display in real-time

userStories.title: Create useRealTimeMarkets hook for market updates
userStories.description: As a user, I need real-time market price updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Update market prices when events received
Add green/red flash for price changes
Update trend indicators when they change
Verify in browser that market prices update in real-time

userStories.title: Create useRealTimeSystemStatus hook for system status
userStories.description: As a user, I need real-time system status updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Update status indicator when status changes
Show alert banner when status becomes unhealthy
Verify in browser that system status updates correctly

userStories.title: Create useRealTimeMT5 hook for MT5 events
userStories.description: As a user, I need real-time updates for MT5 connection and order events.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribe to mt5_connected and mt5_disconnected events
Subscribe to mt5_order_opened and mt5_order_closed events
Update MT5 connection status when events received
Show toast for new orders opened/closed
Display error messages for MT5 errors

userStories.title: Integrate WebSocket hooks into dashboard components
userStories.description: As a user, I need all dashboard data to update in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribe to all data streams when on dashboard
Unsubscribe from non-visible tabs when switching tabs
Verify in browser that all data updates in real-time

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket error recovery and reconnection
userStories.description: As a user, I need the system to recover from connection errors automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Restore all subscriptions after successful reconnect
Request full data refresh after reconnect
Show error message after 3 failed reconnect attempts
Add 'Manual Reconnect' button in connection status
Verify in browser that reconnection works correctly

userStories.title: Add toast notifications for important WebSocket events
userStories.description: As a user, I need visual notifications for important real-time events.
acceptanceCriteria: Create toast notification hook or use existing toast system
Show toast on new signal (pending approval)
Show toast on trade closed with significant P&L
Show toast on evolution generation change
Show toast on MT5 connection status change
Show toast on system status change to unhealthy
Include actionable buttons in toasts (View, Approve, Reject)
Limit toast frequency to avoid spam
Verify in browser that toasts display appropriately
